nasb.text: Therefore, I will bring the worst of the nations, and they will possess their houses. I will also make the pride of the strong ones cease, and their holy places will be profaned.

esv.text: I will bring the worst of the nations to take possession of their houses. I will put an end to the pride of the strong, and their holy places shall be profaned.

cnv.text: 我要使列國中最兇惡的人來佔領他們的房屋； 我要止息強盛者的驕傲，他們的聖所都被褻瀆。

ccb.text: 我必让最凶恶的外族人侵占他们的房屋。我必挫掉强悍之人的傲气，使他们的圣所遭受亵渎。
